summary: Fixed two issues in the failure-path of cmdCronTick: (1) wrapped _commentIssue in a try-catch so a throwing comment call cannot swallow the original run error, and (2) added a return-value check so a false/falsy result from _commentIssue emits a console.warn. Added four new unit tests covering title sanitization (newlines, control chars, >200-char truncation) and the two new _commentIssue failure cases (returns false, throws). All 549 tests pass.
